---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a problem with the support site (broken link, typo, rendering issue)
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the problem.

## Page / URL
Which page on the support site?

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error / broken behavior

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment
- **Browser**: (e.g., Safari 17, Chrome 120)
- **Device / OS**: (e.g., iPhone 15 / iOS 17.2, macOS 14.1)
